claims.summary: A binary typed_precedence_over_legacy flag can mask a smeared or contradictory hybrid transition.
claims.disposition: implement hybrid_coherence_index across the canonical 32-slot typed-to-legacy order

claims.summary: Hybrid disagreement needs a magnitude and named state rather than silent precedence.
claims.disposition: implement hybrid_max_abs_delta, aligned/near/mixed/divergent states, and mismatch issues

claims.summary: Typed payloads must continue to win routing even when legacy slots disagree.
claims.disposition: verify the contradictory fixture keeps typed canonical values while coherence reports zero and divergent

claims.summary: Matching typed and legacy payloads should remain additive and backward compatible.
claims.disposition: verify exact aligned coherence, zero maximum delta, serde defaults, and unchanged legacy reconstruction
